creator: theron.tarigo@gmail.com
text: What is the resistance to adding NO_PACKAGE=yes to the port *right now* and the issue resolves itself next time the repository is rebuilt?  12.0 users will revolt?  At this point: Existing installations of 12.0 will keep working, just not receive any drm-kmod pkg upgrades.  New installations of 12.0 (why?) would be in exactly same camp as 12.1: need to build the port locally.
